asset: VX-27 sci-fi wall panel texture pack
tiling: intended for horizontal tiling; all maps share identical dimensions

recommended_material.colorSpace: sRGB for albedo/emissive; NonColor/Linear for normal, roughness, metallic, AO, height
recommended_material.heightScale: 0.02 to 0.05 metres depending on wall scale
recommended_material.emissiveIntensity: 3 to 8 for dark scenes; enable bloom/glow layer for blue lights
recommended_material.uvScale: repeat X as needed, Y = 1 for full wall strip

notes: Blue/cyan light pixels are isolated into emissive map so they stay bright when the scene is dark.
Albedo has the blue glow reduced slightly to avoid double-lighting when emissive is active.
Normal, height and AO are derived from the wall image and should be treated as game-ready support maps rather than scanned geometry.
